mapper.insert: insert into batch.approval_command ( tenant_id, approval_no, approval_type, action_type, target_type, target_id, payload_json, approval_status, requester_id, source_trace_id, source_idempotency_key, approval_reason, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{approvalNo}, #{approvalType}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, cast(#{payloadJson} as jsonb), #{approvalStatus}, #{requesterId}, #{sourceTraceId}, #{sourceIdempotencyKey}, #{approvalReason}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
